description_long: This object is a very thin, elongated rectangular prism with a uniform, light-colored surface, resembling the profile of a closed book viewed from its edge. The object appears to have a subtle, slightly darker band near its center, which could indicate a spine or binding. There are no visible markings, illustrations, or text on any of the surfaces, and the overall appearance is minimalistic and plain. The proportions suggest it is much taller than it is wide or thick, giving it a slender, almost stick-like form. The surface finish appears smooth and matte, with no glossy or reflective qualities. The object is likely made of paper or cardboard, possibly with a thin outer layer for durability.
description: A very thin, tall, and plain book with a light-colored, smooth surface and a subtle central band, lacking any visible illustration or text.
description_view_0: A straight-on view of the book's narrow edge, showing its full height and a faint central band.
description_view_1: A top-down view revealing only the thin top edge, with no visible details or markings.
description_view_2: A reverse edge view similar to view 0, showing the book's height and the central band from the opposite side.
description_view_3: A side view displaying the book's extreme thinness and the subtle band at the center.
